summary: Iteration 9 - Final Control & Trust Lock testing complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Matrix readability (Revenue/Expense section headers, Total rows with borders, Net P/L with 2px border, Cash Balance row), Variance bar, ActualInputDialog with Impact Preview, SSOT compliance (no .reduce() in frontend).
critical_code_review_comments: SSOT VERIFIED: CashFlowTable.jsx has NO .reduce(), calcRowTotal, or sum() operations - reads row_total, total_revenue, total_cost, total_net directly from backend
seed_data_creation: Test flows created and cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final Control & Trust Lock verified. All features working: (1) UNDO system - record actual + carry forward → undo → zero residual, write-off → undo → occurrence removed, parent edit with linked children → undo → both restored, delete with orphan children → undo → parent AND children parent_id restored, multi-step chain (3 creates → 3 undos) → zero drift. (2) CREED 2 - Projection == Matrix exact match for all 12 months, 24M horizon, revenue - cost = net. (3) SSOT - Backend provides total_revenue, total_cost, total_net, row_total; frontend reads directly with NO .reduce(). (4) Variance tracking - /api/variance-summary returns actuals_recorded, total_variance, total_carried_forward, total_written_off. (5) Matrix readability - Revenue/Expense section headers with colored borders, Total Revenue/Cost rows with bold emphasis and borders, Net P/L row with 2px top border, Cash Balance row with cyan/rose coloring. (6) ActualInputDialog - Impact preview shows cash position change, target month, consequence description; overperformance/underperformance handled correctly.

Backend: Projection total_net == Matrix total_net
Backend: revenue_per_month - cost_per_month == net_per_month (all months)
Backend: 24M horizon projection == matrix total
Backend: cash_now matches between projection and matrix

Backend: Matrix rows include row_total
Backend: Variance summary returns required fields
Backend: UNDO record actual + carry forward → zero residual
Backend: UNDO write-off variance → occurrence removed
Backend: UNDO parent edit with linked children → both restored
Backend: UNDO delete with orphan children → parent AND children parent_id restored
Backend: UNDO multi-step chain (3 creates → 3 undos) → zero drift
Backend: Distributed revenue with linked COGS → correct per-period amounts
Backend: Entity filter changes matrix totals
Frontend: CashFlowTable found

Frontend: Total Revenue row with border styling
Frontend: Total Cost row

Frontend: Carry forward button shows target month

tests_passed: Record actual + carry forward → undo → zero residual (no leftover occurrence or carryover)
Write-off variance → undo → occurrence removed, no carryover
Parent edit with linked % children → undo → parent and children amounts fully restored
Delete with orphan children → undo → parent restored AND children parent_id restored
Multi-step chain (3 creates → 3 undos) → zero drift from baseline
Projection net_per_month == Matrix net_per_month for all 12 months
revenue_per_month - cost_per_month == net_per_month for every month
cash_now matches between projection and matrix

ssot_backend_totals.details: Matrix response includes total_revenue, total_cost, total_net, row_total. Frontend reads these directly with NO .reduce() or sum operations.

variance_tracking.details: GET /api/variance-summary returns actuals_recorded, total_variance, total_carried_forward, total_written_off. Variance bar appears in matrix header when actuals exist.

actuals_ux_impact_preview.details: Impact preview section visible when variance exists. Shows cash position change, target month, consequence description. Underperformance shows carry forward as recovery flow. Overperformance shows carry forward as adjustment.

matrix_readability.details: Revenue and Expense section headers have stronger visual separation (colored borders). Total Revenue and Total Cost rows have bold emphasis with border. Net P/L row has bold font, 2px top border. Cash Balance row visible with cyan/rose coloring.

distributed_flows.details: Distributed revenue (monthly, 6 periods, 60000) shows per-period = 10000. Linked COGS (40%) shows per-period = -4000.

entity_filtering.details: Matrix totals change when entity filter applied.
